summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AgroSense AI - smart post-harvest storage monitoring dashboard. All 25 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing completed successfully with all 4 pages (Dashboard, Insights, Trends, Alerts) rendering correctly. Simulation flow (FAB button) works correctly. Responsive design verified on both desktop and mobile viewports.

integration_issues.issue: FAB button click is intercepted by 'Made with Emergent' badge overlay. Requires JavaScript click or force=True to work. This is a preview environment issue, not a code bug.

critical_code_review_comments: RiskGauge component has animation that starts from 0 - this is intentional UX but may cause confusion in screenshots
All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
API responses correctly exclude MongoDB _id field
Simulation state is in-memory (global variable) - resets on server restart as documented

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load, navigation works, simulation works)

seed_data_creation: MongoDB seeded with monitoring data (id=monitor-001), 7 history entries, and 5 alerts on server startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs verified working: GET /api/dashboard, GET /api/insights, GET /api/trends, GET /api/alerts (with filter params), POST /api/simulate-alert, POST /api/reset-simulation. Frontend has 4 pages with proper data-testid attributes. Simulation FAB requires JavaScript click due to Emergent badge overlay in preview environment.

backend_apis: GET /api/dashboard - returns crop, sensors, risk_score=67, risk_level=WARNING ✓
GET /api/insights - returns advisory, primary_driver, crop_options, safe_ranges, recommended_actions ✓
POST /api/simulate-alert - changes risk_score to 89 and risk_level to ALERT ✓
POST /api/reset-simulation - resets back to normal state ✓
frontend_pages: Dashboard - risk gauge, sensor cards grid, WARNING badge ✓
Insights - AI Advisory card, Primary Driver with contribution bars, Crop Profile dropdown, Recommended Actions ✓
Trends - Recharts line chart with 4 toggleable metrics, stat cards ✓
Alerts - filter tabs (All/Warning/Watch/Info), alert list, sticky warning banner ✓
ui_interactions: Simulate Alert FAB button - bumps risk to 89/ALERT ✓
Reset button - returns to normal state ✓
Desktop sidebar navigation - all 4 pages accessible ✓
Trend toggle buttons - toggle chart lines ✓
Crop dropdown - opens and shows options ✓
